name: OneTigris Cotton Canvas Dog Backpack
description: **Remember to measure your pet for the paw-fect fit.** The OneTigris Cotton Canvas Medium & Large Dog Backpack lets you get into the wild with your adventurous pup. These sleek, stylish saddlebags are made from heavy-duty cotton canvas that’s lightweight and durable with a vintage look. There are a variety of storage options for all the food, water and supplies she’ll need for the day including large zippered pouches on each side that feature a small zippered inner pocket for keys, money or other small items, as well as outer pockets that are held closed with fuzzy fastener straps for quick and easy access. The fully adjustable neck strap and dual chest and belly straps with quick-release buckles provide a snug, secure and comfortable fit.
